## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly catch-up to discuss ongoing projects, updates, and blockers across various platforms and tools used by the GrowthX Labs team.](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Multiple platforms (DataGrid, Galileo, Zan, Papid, Strapi) discussed; various tasks in different stages of completion](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Publishing automation and API key issues need immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team encouraged to follow processes and escalate blockers when necessary](https://fathom.video/share/2MrxaQWSZCj-xC8ToqyT8cpgThKstZd4?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
